요한계시록 16:1.content: I heard a loud voice out of the temple, saying to the seven angels, “Go and pour out the seven bowls of the wrath of God on the earth!”

요한계시록 16:2.content: The first went, and poured out his bowl into the earth, and it became a harmful and evil sore on the people who had the mark of the beast, and who worshiped his image.

요한계시록 16:3.content: The second angel poured out his bowl into the sea, and it became blood as of a dead man. Every living thing in the sea died.

요한계시록 16:4.content: The third poured out his bowl into the rivers and springs of water, and they became blood.

요한계시록 16:5.content: I heard the angel of the waters saying, “You are righteous, who are and who were, O Holy One, because you have judged these things.

요한계시록 16:6.content: For they poured out the blood of saints and prophets, and you have given them blood to drink. They deserve this.”

요한계시록 16:7.content: I heard the altar saying, “Yes, Lord God, the Almighty, true and righteous are your judgments.”

요한계시록 16:8.content: The fourth poured out his bowl on the sun, and it was given to him to scorch men with fire.

요한계시록 16:9.content: People were scorched with great heat, and people blasphemed the name of God who has the power over these plagues. They didn’t repent and give him glory.

요한계시록 16:10.content: The fifth poured out his bowl on the throne of the beast, and his kingdom was darkened. They gnawed their tongues because of the pain,

요한계시록 16:11.content: and they blasphemed the God of heaven because of their pains and their sores. They didn’t repent of their works.

요한계시록 16:12.content: The sixth poured out his bowl on the great river, the Euphrates. Its water was dried up, that the way might be prepared for the kings that come from the sunrise.

요한계시록 16:13.content: I saw coming out of the mouth of the dragon, and out of the mouth of the beast, and out of the mouth of the false prophet, three unclean spirits, something like frogs;

요한계시록 16:14.content: for they are spirits of demons, performing signs; which go out to the kings of the whole inhabited earth, to gather them together for the war of that great day of God, the Almighty.

요한계시록 16:15.content: “Behold, I come like a thief. Blessed is he who watches, and keeps his clothes, so that he doesn’t walk naked, and they see his shame.”

요한계시록 16:16.content: He gathered them together into the place which is called in Hebrew, “Megiddo”.

요한계시록 16:17.content: The seventh poured out his bowl into the air. A loud voice came out of the temple of heaven, from the throne, saying, “It is done!”

요한계시록 16:18.content: There were lightnings, sounds, and thunders; and there was a great earthquake, such as has not happened since there were men on the earth, so great an earthquake, and so mighty.

요한계시록 16:19.content: The great city was divided into three parts, and the cities of the nations fell. Babylon the great was remembered in the sight of God, to give to her the cup of the wine of the fierceness of his wrath.

요한계시록 16:20.content: Every island fled away, and the mountains were not found.

요한계시록 16:21.content: Great hailstones, about the weight of a talent, came down out of the sky on people. People blasphemed God because of the plague of the hail, for this plague is exceedingly severe.
